_comment: Engine A manual inputs. Update from Trendlyne Sunday morning.

nifty_pe.notes: Nifty 50 PE from Trendlyne main page. Used for Valuation score (max 15).

fii_30day_net_cr.notes: FII Net 30-day in Rs Crores. Negative = net sellers. Used for Flows score.

dii_30day_net_cr.notes: DII Net 30-day in Rs Crores. Positive = net buyers. Used for Flows score.

breadth_pct_above_200dma.notes: Count of Nifty 500 above 200 SMA, divided by 500, times 100. Used for Breadth score (max 12).

yield_curve_inverted.notes: Yes if 1Y yield greater than 10Y yield. Used for Macro score.

rbi_stance.notes: Current RBI policy stance. Used for Macro score.

cpi_pct.notes: Latest headline CPI inflation percent. Used for Macro score.

pmi_manufacturing.notes: Latest India Manufacturing PMI. Above 50 = expansion. Used for Macro score.
